title: Nee Poiya Lyrics Isai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Isai  Nee poiya song lyrics
Singer : Vijay Yesudhas
Music : SJ Surya

Naan kaanbadhu ingu unmaya
Uyire en uyire
nee saagaadhiru

Naan vazhvadhey ingu unmaya
En manamey en manamey
Nee veelaadhiru

Enai sutta nilavu poiya
Enai thotta thendral poiya
Nee itta muththam poiya
Penne nee meiyya illai poiya

Siruoru idhayaththai
Marupadi Marupadi
Ulagamey midhiththadi

Valiyilum thuyarilum
Kulambiya irudhayam
Unakena thudiththadhadi

Veelgayil naan veelgayil
Un kadhal thaangumadi

Neeyumey poi aaginaal
En uyire neengumadi

Nee poiya
Yaar kettadhu indha kadhalai
Ye vizhiye ne avalai yen kaatinaai

Yaar kettadhu indha poiyinai
Ye manamey enaye ne emaattrinaai

Aval mooral muluvadhum poiya
Aval vizhiyin mozhigal poiya
Aval muththam moththam poiya
Enakaai thudiththaale
Adhu poiya

Kanavugal vilaivadhum
Kanavugal kalaivadhum
Dhinam dhinam nigalvadhadi

Oru yuga ninaivinai
Nodiyinil udaipadhu
Kodumayin kodumayadi

Pillai pol siru pillai pol
Oru nenjam kondirundhaen
Mullai pol oru Mullai pol
Adhil unnai sumandhirundhaen .
Kilikindraen.

Kaatrindiye ingu vaasamaa
Ye malare un idhalaal nee pesinaai

Vaan indriye ingu thooralaa
Ye mugilae yaen thuliyaai
Ne poi pesinaai.

Avalin kanmai Unmai
Aval idhalin menmai Unmai
Aval penmai kooda Unmai
Meyyae poi endraal
Edhu Unmai ?

Avalayum isaiyayum
Enadhiru vizhiyena
Ulagaththai rasithirundhaen.

Vizhigalil pilai illai
Ulagamey dhideerena
Irundida kulambi nindraen.

Aimbulab en aimbulam
Unnai aiyyam kolludhadi
Nenjamo en nenjamo
Adhai yetrida marukkudhadi

Edhu Unmai ?
Edhu Unmai?

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nee Poiya'?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, expressing deep emotional connections.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Isai'?

The movie revolves around music and relationships, showcasing the struggles and triumphs of a musician.

Who is the singer of 'Nee Poiya'?

The song is sung by Vijay Yesudas, known for his melodious voice.

Who composed the music for 'Isai'?

The music for the movie is composed by SJ Surya, who is also the director.

When was 'Nee Poiya' released?

The song was released on November 18, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nee Poiya, the protagonist expresses a deep yearning for love, reflecting the emotional turmoil faced in relationships. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics create an atmosphere of nostalgia and longing. It beautifully encapsulates the essence of love's complexities, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. As the music unfolds, listeners are drawn into a world of emotions, resonating with the sentiments of love and heartache.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nee Poiya from Isai is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Vijay Yesudas's soulful voice and SJ Surya's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet moments of romance. Dive into this emotional journey and let the music sweep you away.
stanzaMeanings: When I see you here, my life, my soul, please don't go away.
I live here for you, my heart, my heart, please don't leave.
The moon that left me is a lie, the breeze that touched me is a lie, your kisses are a lie, girl, you are not real.
A small heart, again and again, the world is getting confused.
In pain and sorrow, the heart is crying for you.
In the wind, in the wind, your love is enduring.
If you are a lie, then my life is also gone.
Who heard this love? Why did you show her with those eyes?
Who heard this lie? Why did you change my heart?
Everything about her is a lie, her eyes speak lies, her kisses are all lies, when I touch her, it's all a lie.
Dreams are playing, dreams are mixing, every day they are fading away.
A memory from an era is lost in the moment, it's a great pain.
Like a child, like a small child, I held a heart, like a jasmine, I kept you close. I am fluttering.
Is the breeze here? Oh flower, you spoke with your fragrance.
Is the sky here? Oh cloud, why did you become a shadow? You spoke lies.
Her beauty is the truth, her essence is the truth, even her femininity is the truth. If all this is a lie, then what is the truth?
With her and music, I was lost in the world.
In the eyes, there is no child, the world is getting older, I stood still.
My five senses are overwhelmed by you, my heart cannot forget you.
What is the truth? What is the truth?
